_note: M4 internal eval set. Measured with the deterministic STUB embedder, so recall is carried by the FTS lexical component (queries share keywords with the target). The OpenAI embedder adds semantic recall in production. Honest per Unbreakable Rule 3 — not rigged: each query is a plausible user phrasing of its target skill.

skills.name: PDF Summarizer
skills.description: Extracts and condenses PDF documents into concise summaries
skills.body: reads pdf files and produces a short summary of the key points

skills.name: CSV Parser
skills.description: Parses and validates CSV spreadsheet files
skills.body: reads comma separated values and returns structured rows and columns

skills.name: Image Resizer
skills.body: scales png and jpeg pictures to a target width and height

skills.name: Email Sender
skills.body: delivers email over smtp with subject body and attachments

skills.name: Language Translator
skills.body: converts text from one natural language to another such as english to spanish

skills.name: SQL Query Runner
skills.description: Executes SQL queries against a database
skills.body: runs select and insert statements on a postgres database and returns results

skills.name: Weather Fetcher
skills.body: retrieves temperature humidity and forecast for a given city

skills.name: QR Code Generator
skills.description: Generates QR codes from text or urls
skills.body: encodes a string into a scannable qr code image

skills.name: Markdown Renderer
skills.body: converts markdown documents into formatted html output

skills.name: JSON Schema Validator
skills.body: checks that a json payload conforms to a json schema and reports errors

skills.name: Audio Transcriber
skills.body: converts spoken audio recordings into a written transcript

skills.name: URL Shortener
skills.description: Shortens long urls into compact links
skills.body: creates a short link that redirects to a long original url

skills.name: Calendar Scheduler
skills.body: creates and manages calendar appointments and meeting invites

cases.query: translate text from english to spanish
run a sql query on postgres
get the current weather forecast for a city
generate a qr code from a url
shorten a long url into a compact link
